PRIVACY POLICY : mobile applicationsPRIVACY POLICYOn the protection of your personal data for the EU Mobile Apps provided by the Publications Office of the European Union

decoder_heading: The European Union is committed to user privacy.
ident_heading: The European Union is committed to user privacy.
heading_content_part: The European Union is committed to user privacy.

decoder_heading: The policy on protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data by the Union institutions is based on
ident_heading: The policy on protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data by the Union institutions is based on
heading_content_part: The policy on protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data by the Union institutions is based on

Regulation (EU) 2018/1725of the European Parliament and of the Council of 23 October 2018 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data by the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies and on the free movement of such data.We do not collect, process nor disclose your personal data through this mobile application.

decoder_heading: HOW DO WE TREAT E-MAILS YOU SEND US?
ident_heading: HOW DO WE TREAT E-MAILS YOU SEND US?
heading_content_part: HOW DO WE TREAT E-MAILS YOU SEND US?

decoder_heading: When you send an e-mail message or a request, your personal data is processed only to the extent necessary to reply.
ident_heading: When you send an e-mail message or a request, your personal data is processed only to the extent necessary to reply.
heading_content_part: When you send an e-mail message or a request, your personal data is processed only to the extent necessary to reply.

decoder_heading: If the management team of the mailbox is unable to answer your question, it will forward your e-mail to another service.
ident_heading: If the management team of the mailbox is unable to answer your question, it will forward your e-mail to another service.
heading_content_part: If the management team of the mailbox is unable to answer your question, it will forward your e-mail to another service.

decoder_heading: You will be informed, via e-mail, about which service your question has been forwarded to.
ident_heading: You will be informed, via e-mail, about which service your question has been forwarded to.
heading_content_part: You will be informed, via e-mail, about which service your question has been forwarded to.If you have any questions about the processing of your e-mail and related personal data, do not hesitate to include them in your message.The processing of personal data by ourHelpdeskis covered by aprivacy statementof which the specific processing has been notified to the Data Protection Officer (DPO) with the following reference:DPR-EC-00493

decoder_heading: You will be informed, via e-mail, about which service your question has been forwarded to.

heading_content_part: The Commission DPO publishes the register of all operations processing personal data.You can access the register on the following link:http://ec.europa.eu/dpo-register.
